status: STUB — KARN-W9-B2 session lacks SMOKE_SESSION_COOKIE, SMOKE_CHART_ID, and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY at run time
purpose: Pre-BHISMA Stream 2 baseline (planner-off path) — captured BEFORE any pipeline change in this session, per BHISMA_PLAN_v1_0.md §4.8 / GAP.P.9.
note: The dev server at http://localhost:3000 IS up (returns HTTP 307 on root), but the three required secrets are unset in this session: SMOKE_SESSION_COOKIE (Firebase __session cookie), SMOKE_CHART_ID (a chart UUID with seeded data), and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (for the Haiku judge). Without all three, the runner cannot complete a scored fixture pass. Per BHISMA_PLAN §4.8 escape clause and the user-brief halt-condition for unavailable eval inputs ("record STUB and proceed; note as known gap"), a STUB is recorded here and the session proceeds with implementation. The post-BHISMA paired run (planner_branch=on) will be authored by a later session that can supply the secrets — most likely the same session that flips LLM_FIRST_PLANNER_ENABLED=true after smoke verification.

known_gap.rationale: BHISMA Stream 2 implementation does not require the baseline to be runnable from inside this session — it requires the baseline to be authored as a placeholder and the slot to be ready for the post-BHISMA paired run. Both conditions are met by this STUB.

command_to_run_when_secrets_available: export SMOKE_CHART_ID=<chart UUID with seeded MSR/UCN>
ac_disposition: STUB recorded; post-BHISMA paired run is the gating measurement
